source_pr.title: executor: make `group_concat` function consider the collation
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/27429

make `group_concat` function consider the collation

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->


symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select upper(group_concat(distinct value order by 1)) from test.t;").Check(testkit.Rows("ABC,DEF")) (executor/analyze_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select upper(group_concat(distinct value order by 1)) from test.t;").Check(testkit.Rows("ABC,DEF")) (executor/analyze_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: tk.MustQuery("select upper(group_concat(distinct value order by 1)) from test.t;").Check(testkit.Rows("ABC,DEF")) (executor/analyze_test.go).
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select upper(group_concat(distinct value order by 1)) from test.t;").Check(testkit.Rows("ABC,DEF")) (executor/analyze_test.go)
